void.string: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns1="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Remove="Remove" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:replaceStr="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:stringtext="stringtext" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode Remove ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace replaceStr rounding sringindex strings stringtext truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <AccountStmtRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ErrorCode"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ErrorMsg"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <AccountName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/AccountName"></xsl:value-of> </AccountName> <AccountNumber> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/AccountNumber"></xsl:value-of> </AccountNumber> <CustomerNumber> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/CustomerNumber"></xsl:value-of> </CustomerNumber> <CCY> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/CCY"></xsl:value-of> </CCY> <StartBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/StartBalance"></xsl:value-of> </StartBalance> <EndingBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/EndingBalance"></xsl:value-of> </EndingBalance> <ListTxn> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/AccountStmtRp/ListTxn/TxnDetail"> <TxnDetail> <TxnDate> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnDate"></xsl:value-of> </TxnDate> <TxnRef> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnRef"></xsl:value-of> </TxnRef> <TxnContent> <xsl:value-of select="./TxnContent"></xsl:value-of> </TxnContent> <ValueDate> <xsl:value-of select="./ValueDate"></xsl:value-of> </ValueDate> <MoneyOut> <xsl:value-of select="./MoneyOut"></xsl:value-of> </MoneyOut> <MoneyIn> <xsl:value-of select="./MoneyIn"></xsl:value-of> </MoneyIn> <Balance> <xsl:value-of select="./Balance"></xsl:value-of> </Balance> </TxnDetail> </xsl:for-each> </ListTxn> </AccountStmtRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountStmtRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CCY" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="StartBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="EndingBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="ListTxn"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="TxnDetail"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnDate" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnRef" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnContent" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ValueDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="MoneyOut" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="MoneyIn" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="Balance" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountStmtRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="AccountNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CustomerNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="CCY" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="StartBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="EndingBalance" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="ListTxn"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="TxnDetail"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnDate" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnRef" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnContent" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ValueDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="MoneyOut" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="MoneyIn" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="Balance" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
